home.subtitle: Personality Assessment
home.headline: Discover your Big Five personality profile
home.body: A 30-question scientific assessment based on the IPIP item pool (public domain). Takes about 5 minutes. Your answers are processed entirely in your browser — nothing is stored.
home.footnote: Based on Goldberg et al. (2006) · IPIP · Open source ·

test.subtitle: Big Five · 30 items
test.instructions: Rate the extent to which each statement applies to you.
test.itemPrefix: I see myself as someone who

results.title: Your personality profile
results.subtitle: Based on the Big Five model · IPIP · 30 items
results.disclaimer: Note: This is a brief screening instrument. Scores reflect tendencies at the time of assessment, not fixed traits. For clinical or research-grade assessment, use a validated full-length inventory.

extraversion.label: Extraversion
extraversion.description: Sociability, assertiveness, and energy in social situations.

agreeableness.label: Agreeableness
agreeableness.description: Compassion, cooperativeness, and trust toward others.

conscientiousness.label: Conscientiousness
conscientiousness.description: Organization, productivity, and sense of responsibility.

negativeEmotionality.label: Negative Emotionality
negativeEmotionality.description: Tendency toward anxiety, low mood, and emotional reactivity.

openMindedness.label: Open-Mindedness
openMindedness.description: Curiosity, creativity, and appreciation for ideas and beauty.
